探索 d:\llapk 项目中的转录功能实现，重点关注：
1. WhisperService.kt 的实现细节和问题
2. 语言检测机制
3. 分段转录策略（FFmpegSegmentedTranscriptionService.kt）
4. 本地转录 vs 云端转录的实现
5. 转录结果的存储和处理

目标：了解当前转录系统的架构和问题，为重新设计提供依据。

1→package com.multilanglearner.data.network
     2→
     3→import android.util.Log
     4→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.AIConfig
     5→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.WordTimestamp
     6→import kotlinx.serialization.Serializable
     7→import kotlinx.serialization.json.*
     8→import okhttp3.*
     9→import okhttp3.MediaType.Companion.toMediaType
    10→import okhttp3.RequestBody.Companion.asRequestBody
    11→import okhttp3.RequestBody.Companion.toRequestBody
    12→import java.io.File
    13→import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
    14→import javax.inject.Inject
    15→import javax.inject.Singleton
    16→
    17→@Serializable
    18→data class WhisperResult(
    19→    val success: Boolean,
    20→    val text: String = "",
    21→    val words: List<WordTimestamp> = emptyList(),
    22→    val detectedLang: String = "",
    23→    val error: String = ""
    24→)
    25→
    26→@Singleton
    27→class WhisperService @Inject constructor() {
    28→    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    29→        .connectTimeout(15, TimeUnit.SECONDS)  // 减少连接超时，加快重试
    30→        .readTimeout(600, TimeUnit.SECONDS)    // 增加读取超时，支持长音频
    31→        .writeTimeout(120, TimeUnit.SECONDS)   // 增加写入超时
    32→        .retryOnConnectionFailure(true)        // 启用自动重试
    33→        .build()
    34→
    35→    private val json = Json { ignoreUnknownKeys = true }
    36→
    37→    // Groq API 文件大小限制（官方限制 25MB，设置安全值）
    38→    // 参考：https://console.groq.com/docs/speech-to-text
    39→    private val MAX_FILE_SIZE = 25 * 1024 * 1024L
    40→    private val MIN_FILE_SIZE = 1024L // 最小 1KB，避免空文件或太小的文件
    41→
    42→    // 最大重试次数
    43→    private val MAX_RETRIES = 3
    44→
    45→    /**
    46→     * Transcribe audio via Groq Whisper API
    47→     * 优先使用 groqApiKey，其次使用 provider 为 groq 时的 apiKey
    48→     * 重试由上层 FFmpegSegmentedTranscriptionService 统一管理，避免重复重试
    49→     */
    50→    suspend fun transcribeGroq(audioFile: File, config: AIConfig, lang: String? = null, contextPrompt: String? = null): WhisperResult? {
    51→        return transcribeGroqInternal(audioFile, config, lang, contextPrompt)
    52→    }
    53→
    54→    /**
    55→     * 检查是否是速率限制错误（429）
    56→     * 从错误消息中提取需要等待的时间（秒）
    57→     */
    58→    fun isRateLimitError(errorMsg: String): Pair<Boolean, Int> {
    59→        val rateLimitPattern = Regex("Please try again in (\\d+)s")
    60→        val match = rateLimitPattern.find(errorMsg)
    61→        return if (match != null) {
    62→            val seconds = match.groupValues[1].toIntOrNull() ?: 0
    63→            Pair(true, seconds)
    64→        } else {
    65→            Pair(false, 0)
    66→        }
    67→    }
    68→
    69→    /**
    70→     * 内部转录实现
    71→     */
    72→    private suspend fun transcribeGroqInternal(audioFile: File, config: AIConfig, lang: String? = null, contextPrompt: String? = null): WhisperResult? {
    73→        // 获取 Groq API Key：优先使用专门的 groqApiKey，其次检查 provider 是否为 groq
    74→        val apiKey = config.groqApiKey.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
    75→            ?: (config.apiKey.takeIf { config.provider == "groq" && it.isNotBlank() })
    76→            ?: return WhisperResult(success = false, error = "❌ 未配置 Groq API Key\n\n请前往「AI 设置」配置 Groq API Key。\n获取 API Key：https://console.groq.com/keys")
    77→
    78→        val whisperModel = config.whisperModel.ifBlank { "whisper-large-v3-turbo" }
    79→
    80→        // 检查文件大小
    81→        val fileSize = audioFile.length()
    82→        Log.d("WhisperService", "File size: $fileSize bytes, max: $MAX_FILE_SIZE")
    83→
    84→        // 检查最小文件大小
    85→        if (fileSize < MIN_FILE_SIZE) {
    86→            Log.e("WhisperService", "File too small: $fileSize bytes (min: $MIN_FILE_SIZE)")
    87→            return WhisperResult(
    88→                success = false,
    89→                error = "❌ 视频文件过小\n\n文件大小: ${fileSize / 1024} KB\n最小要求: 1 KB\n\n建议：请使用包含音频内容的有效视频文件"
    90→            )
    91→        }
    92→
    93→        if (fileSize > MAX_FILE_SIZE) {
    94→            val sizeMB = String.format("%.2f", fileSize / 1024.0 / 1024.0)
    95→            Log.e("WhisperService", "File too large: $sizeMB MB (max: 25 MB)")
    96→            return WhisperResult(
    97→                success = false,
    98→                error = "❌ 视频文件过大\n\n文件大小: $sizeMB MB\nGroq 限制: 25 MB\n\n建议解决方案：\n1. 应用会自动分段处理大文件\n2. 如果仍然失败，请使用较短的视频\n3. 或在设置中切换到其他 AI 提供商"
    99→            )
   100→        }
   101→
   102→        Log.d("WhisperService", "Starting transcription with Groq Whisper: model=$whisperModel, file=${audioFile.name}, size=$fileSize")
   103→
   104→        // 根据语言设置合适的 prompt，引导 Whisper 更准确地识别
   105→        val basePrompt = when (lang) {
   106→            "en" -> "Transcribe accurately with proper punctuation and capitalization."
   107→            "ja" -> "正確に句読点を付けて書き起こしてください。"
   108→            "ko" -> "정확하게 구두점을 포함하여 전사하세요."
   109→            "ru" -> "Транскрибируйте точно с правильной пунктуацией."
   110→            "th" -> "ถอดความอย่างถูกต้องพร้อมเครื่องหมายวรรคตอนที่เหมาะสม"
   111→            "vi" -> "Phiên âm chính xác với dấu câu đúng."
   112→            "ms" -> "Transkripsi dengan tepat dan tanda baca yang betul."
   113→            "id" -> "Transkripsikan dengan akurat dan tanda baca yang benar."
   114→            "ar" -> "انسخ بدقة مع علامات الترقيم الصحيحة."
   115→            "pt" -> "Transcreva com precisão e pontuação correta."
   116→            "es" -> "Transcribe con precisión y puntuación correcta."
   117→            "fr" -> "Transcrire avec précision et ponctuation correcte."
   118→            "de" -> "Transkribieren Sie genau mit korrekter Zeichensetzung."
   119→            "hi" -> "सटीक विराम चिह्नों के साथ सही ढंग से लिप्यंतरण करें।"
   120→            "zh" -> "准确转录，使用正确的标点符号。"
   121→            else -> "Transcribe accurately with proper punctuation and capitalization."
   122→        }
   123→        // 拼接上下文 prompt（前一段的最后几句话），帮助 Whisper 识别专有名词和连续语境
   124→        val prompt = if (!contextPrompt.isNullOrBlank()) {
   125→            "$basePrompt $contextPrompt"
   126→        } else {
   127→            basePrompt
   128→        }
   129→
   130→        val bodyBuilder = MultipartBody.Builder().setType(MultipartBody.FORM)
   131→            .addFormDataPart("file", audioFile.name, audioFile.asRequestBody("application/octet-stream".toMediaType()))
   132→            .addFormDataPart("model", whisperModel)
   133→            .addFormDataPart("response_format", "verbose_json")
   134→            .addFormDataPart("timestamp_granularities[]", "word")
   135→            .addFormDataPart("timestamp_granularities[]", "segment")
   136→            .addFormDataPart("temperature", "0")
   137→            .addFormDataPart("prompt", prompt)
   138→
   139→        lang?.let { bodyBuilder.addFormDataPart("language", it) }
   140→
   141→        val request = Request.Builder()
   142→            .url("https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/audio/transcriptions")
   143→            .addHeader("Authorization", "Bearer $apiKey")
   144→            .post(bodyBuilder.build())
   145→            .build()
   146→
   147→        return try {
   148→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Sending request to Groq API...")
   149→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   150→
   151→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Response code: ${response.code}")
   152→
   153→            if (response.code != 200) {
   154→                val errorBody = response.body?.string() ?: "Unknown error"
   155→                Log.e("WhisperService", "API error: $errorBody")
   156→
   157→                // 解析错误信息
   158→                val errorMsg = try {
   159→                    val errorJson = json.parseToJsonElement(errorBody).jsonObject
   160→                    val errObj = errorJson["error"]?.jsonObject
   161→                    val errMsg = errObj?.get("message")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
   162→                    val errType = errObj?.get("type")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
   163→                    val errCode = errObj?.get("code")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
   164→
   165→                    when {
   166→                        errMsg?.contains("invalid_api_key", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   167→                        errMsg?.contains("Unauthorized", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   168→                        response.code == 401 ->
   169→                            "❌ API Key 无效\n\n请检查 Groq API Key 是否正确配置\n\n获取 API Key：https://console.groq.com/keys"
   170→                        errMsg?.contains("quota", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   171→                        errMsg?.contains("limit", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   172→                        errMsg?.contains("rate_limit", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   173→                        response.code == 429 ->
   174→                            "❌ API 配额已用完\n\nGroq API 使用次数已达限制\n\n建议：\n1. 等待配额重置\n2. 更换 API Key\n3. 升级 Groq 账户"
   175→                        errMsg?.contains("forbidden", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   176→                        errMsg?.contains("banned", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   177→                        response.code == 403 ->
   178→                            "❌ 转录被禁止\n\n${errMsg ?: "访问被限制"}\n\n可能原因：\n1. API Key 被禁用\n2. 账户存在违规行为\n3. 内容不符合使用条款"
   179→                        else -> "❌ 转录失败 ($response.code)\n\n${errMsg ?: errorBody}"
   180→                    }
   181→                } catch (e: Exception) {
   182→                    "❌ 转录失败\n\n${errorBody.take(200)}"
   183→                }
   184→
   185→                return WhisperResult(success = false, error = errorMsg)
   186→            }
   187→
   188→            val body = response.body?.string() ?: return WhisperResult(success = false, error = "空响应")
   189→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Response length: ${body.length}")
   190→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Response body preview: ${body.take(500)}")
   191→
   192→            // 检查响应是否为有效的 JSON
   193→            if (!body.trim().startsWith("{") && !body.trim().startsWith("[")) {
   194→                Log.e("WhisperService", "Response is not valid JSON: ${body.take(200)}")
   195→                return WhisperResult(
   196→                    success = false,
   197→                    error = "❌ API 返回格式错误\n\nGroq API 返回了非 JSON 格式的响应。\n\n响应内容：\n${body.take(500)}"
   198→                )
   199→            }
   200→
   201→            try {
   202→                val jsonObj = json.parseToJsonElement(body).jsonObject
   203→                val text = jsonObj["text"]?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull ?: ""
   204→                val detectedLang = jsonObj["language"]?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull ?: ""
   205→
   206→                Log.d("WhisperService", "Transcribed text length: ${text.length}, detected language: $detectedLang")
   207→
   208→                val words = jsonObj["words"]?.jsonArray?.map { w ->
   209→                    val obj = w.jsonObject
   210→                    WordTimestamp(
   211→                        w = obj["word"]?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull ?: "",
   212→                        s = (obj["start"]?.jsonPrimitive?.doubleOrNull ?: 0.0),
   213→                        e = (obj["end"]?.jsonPrimitive?.doubleOrNull ?: 0.0)
   214→                    )
   215→                } ?: emptyList()
   216→
   217→                Log.d("WhisperService", "Word timestamps count: ${words.size}")
   218→
   219→                WhisperResult(
   220→                    success = true,
   221→                    text = text,
   222→                    words = words,
   223→                    detectedLang = detectedLang
   224→                )
   225→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   226→                Log.e("WhisperService", "JSON parsing error", e)
   227→                Log.e("WhisperService", "Response body: $body")
   228→                WhisperResult(
   229→                    success = false,
   230→                    error = "❌ 响应解析失败\n\nGroq API 返回了无法解析的响应。\n\n错误: ${e.message}\n\n响应内容：\n${body.take(500)}"
   231→                )
   232→            }
   233→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   234→            Log.e("WhisperService", "Transcription error", e)
   235→            val errorMsg = when {
   236→                e.message?.contains("timeout", ignoreCase = true) == true ->
   237→                    "❌ 请求超时\n\n网络连接超时，请检查网络连接后重试。"
   238→                e.message?.contains("Unable to resolve host", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   239→                e.message?.contains("UnknownHost", ignoreCase = true) == true ->
   240→                    "❌ 网络连接失败\n\n无法连接到 Groq API 服务器，请检查网络连接。"
   241→                else -> "❌ 转录失败\n\n${e.message ?: "未知错误"}\n\n请检查网络连接和 API Key 配置后重试。"
   242→            }
   243→            WhisperResult(success = false, error = errorMsg)
   244→        }
   245→    }
   246→}
   247→

    35→/**
    36→ * 转录前台服务
    37→ * 允许用户离开页面后继续转录
    38→ */
    39→@AndroidEntryPoint
    40→class TranscriptionService : Service() {
    41→    companion object {
    42→        private const val TAG = "TranscriptionService"
    43→        private const val CHANNEL_ID = "transcription_channel"
    44→        private const val CHANNEL_NAME = "视频转录"
    45→        private const val NOTIFICATION_ID = 1001
    46→
    47→        const val ACTION_START = "com.multilanglearner.ACTION_START_TRANSCRIPTION"
    48→        const val ACTION_CANCEL = "com.multilanglearner.ACTION_CANCEL_TRANSCRIPTION"
    49→        const val ACTION_OPEN = "com.multilanglearner.ACTION_OPEN_PLAYER"
    50→
    51→        const val EXTRA_VIDEO_PATH = "video_path"
    52→        const val EXTRA_VIDEO_NAME = "video_name"
    53→
    54→        // 进度广播
    55→        const val ACTION_PROGRESS = "com.multilanglearner.TRANSCRIPTION_PROGRESS"
    56→        const val EXTRA_SEGMENT = "segment"
    57→        const val EXTRA_TOTAL = "total"
    58→        const val EXTRA_PROGRESS = "progress"
    59→        const val EXTRA_MESSAGE = "message"
    60→        const val EXTRA_REMAINING = "remaining"
    61→
    62→        // 队列状态广播
    63→        const val ACTION_QUEUE_UPDATE = "com.multilanglearner.TRANSCRIPTION_QUEUE_UPDATE"
    64→        const val EXTRA_QUEUE_SIZE = "queue_size"
    65→        const val EXTRA_CURRENT_VIDEO = "current_video"
    66→        const val EXTRA_QUEUE_LIST = "queue_list"
    67→
    68→        // 完成广播
    69→        const val ACTION_COMPLETED = "com.multilanglearner.TRANSCRIPTION_COMPLETED"
    70→        const val EXTRA_SUCCESS = "success"
    71→        const val EXTRA_ERROR = "error"
    72→        const val EXTRA_SUBTITLE_COUNT = "subtitle_count"
    73→        const val EXTRA_DETECTED_LANG = "detected_lang"
    74→        const val EXTRA_VTT_PATH = "vtt_path"
    75→
    76→        // 静态状态，供 ViewModel 在页面恢复时查询
    77→        @Volatile var isRunning = false
    78→            private set
    79→        @Volatile var currentVideoName: String? = null
    80→            private set
    81→        @Volatile var currentProgress: Int = 0
    82→            private set
    83→        @Volatile var currentMessage: String = ""
    84→            private set
    85→    }
    86→
    87→    @Inject
    88→    lateinit var ffmpegSegmentedService: FFmpegSegmentedTranscriptionService
    89→
    90→    @Inject

    92→
    93→    @Inject

    95→
    96→    private val serviceScope = CoroutineScope(Dispatchers.IO + Job())
    97→    private val activeJobs = mutableMapOf<String, Job>() // 支持并行转录
    98→
    99→    private var currentTranscriptionId: String? = null
   100→
   101→    // 用户是否明确触发转录（防止自动重复转录）
   102→    private var userTriggered = false
   103→
   104→    // 转录状态：0=空闲, 1=转录中, 2=已完成, 3=失败, 4=取消
   105→    private var transcriptionStatus = 0
   106→
   107→    // 服务状态
   108→    private val _serviceState = MutableStateFlow<ServiceState>(ServiceState.Idle)
   109→    val serviceState: StateFlow<ServiceState> = _serviceState.asStateFlow()
   110→
   111→    private val binder = LocalBinder()
   112→
   113→    inner class LocalBinder : Binder() {
   114→        fun getService(): TranscriptionService = this@TranscriptionService
   115→    }
   116→
   117→    override fun onBind(intent: Intent?): IBinder = binder
   118→
   119→    override fun onCreate() {
   120→        super.onCreate()
   121→        Log.d(TAG, "Service created")
   122→        createNotificationChannel()
   123→    }
   124→
   125→    override fun onStartCommand(intent: Intent?, flags: Int, startId: Int): Int {
   126→        when (intent?.action) {
   127→            ACTION_START -> {
   128→                val videoPath = intent.getStringExtra(EXTRA_VIDEO_PATH)
   129→                val videoName = intent.getStringExtra(EXTRA_VIDEO_NAME) ?: "视频"
   130→
   131→                // 检查是否已有正在进行的转录
   132→                if (transcriptionStatus == 1) {
   133→                    Log.w(TAG, "Transcription already in progress, ignoring start request")
   134→                    return START_NOT_STICKY
   135→                }
   136→
   137→                if (videoPath != null) {
   138→                    startTranscription(videoPath, videoName)
   139→                }
   140→            }
   141→            ACTION_CANCEL -> {
   142→                cancelTranscription()
   143→            }
   144→        }
   145→        return START_STICKY
   146→    }
   147→
   148→    /**
   149→     * 开始转录
   150→     */
   151→    private fun startTranscription(videoPath: String, videoName: String) {
   152→        Log.d(TAG, "Starting transcription for: $videoPath")
   153→
   154→        val transcriptionId = System.currentTimeMillis().toString()
   155→
   156→        // 只有用户明确触发才执行转录
   157→        userTriggered = true
   158→
   159→        // 更新转录状态为转录中
   160→        transcriptionStatus = 1
   161→
   162→        // 直接并行执行，不再排队
   163→        executeTranscription(transcriptionId, videoPath, videoName)
   164→    }
   165→
   166→    /**
   167→     * 停止转录并重置用户触发标志
   168→     */
   169→    private fun resetUserTrigger() {
   170→        userTriggered = false
   171→        // 完成或取消后，状态改为空闲
   172→        transcriptionStatus = 0
   173→    }
   174→
   175→    /**
   176→     * 标记转录失败
   177→     */
   178→    private fun markAsFailed() {
   179→        transcriptionStatus = 3
   180→    }
   181→
   182→    /**
   183→     * 执行转录任务
   184→     */
   185→    private fun executeTranscription(
   186→        transcriptionId: String,
   187→        videoPath: String,
   188→        videoName: String
   189→    ) {
   190→        currentTranscriptionId = transcriptionId
   191→        isRunning = true
   192→        currentVideoName = videoName
   193→        currentProgress = 0
   194→        currentMessage = "正在准备..."
   195→
   196→        // 启动前台服务
   197→        startForeground(NOTIFICATION_ID, createProgressNotification(videoName, 0, 0, "正在准备..."))
   198→
   199→        val job = serviceScope.launch {
   200→            try {
   201→                _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Transcribing(0, 0, 0, "正在准备...")
   202→
   203→                val config = aiConfigStore.config.first()
   204→                val videoFile = File(videoPath)
   205→
   206→                // 根据转录模式选择引擎
   207→                val transcriptionMode = config.transcriptionMode
   208→                val useLocal = when (transcriptionMode) {
   209→                    "local" -> true
   210→                    "cloud" -> false
   211→                    "auto" -> !isNetworkAvailable() || videoFile.length() > 100 * 1024 * 1024
   212→                    else -> false
   213→                }
   214→
   215→                Log.d(TAG, "Transcription mode: $transcriptionMode, useLocal: $useLocal")
   216→
   217→                val result = if (useLocal) {
   218→                    // 本地转录
   219→                    if (!sherpaOnnxService.isModelDownloaded()) {
   220→                        sendErrorBroadcast("本地模型未下载，请先在 AI 设置中下载模型")
   221→                        _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Error("本地模型未下载")
   222→                        stopForeground(STOP_FOREGROUND_REMOVE)
   223→                        stopSelf()
   224→                        return@launch
   225→                    }
   226→
   227→                    sherpaOnnxService.transcribe(
   228→                        videoFile,
   229→                        onProgress = { progress, message ->
   230→                            updateProgress(videoName, progress, 100, progress, message)
   231→                            sendProgressBroadcast(progress, 100, progress, message, 0)
   232→                            _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Transcribing(progress, 100, progress, message)
   233→                        }
   234→                    )
   235→                } else {
   236→                    // 云端转录
   237→                    val hasGroqKey = config.groqApiKey.isNotBlank() ||
   238→                                     (config.provider == "groq" && config.apiKey.isNotBlank())
   239→
   240→                    if (!hasGroqKey) {
   241→                        sendErrorBroadcast("❌ 请先配置 Groq API Key\n\n获取 API Key：https://console.groq.com/keys")
   242→                        _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Error("请先配置 Groq API Key")
   243→                        stopForeground(STOP_FOREGROUND_REMOVE)
   244→                        stopSelf()
   245→                        return@launch
   246→                    }
   247→
   248→                    val transcribeLang = config.transcribeLanguage.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
   249→                    ffmpegSegmentedService.transcribeWithSegments(
   250→                        videoFile,
   251→                        config,
   252→                        transcribeLang,
   253→                        onProgress = { segment, total, progress, message, remainingSeconds ->
   254→                            updateProgress(videoName, segment, total, progress, message)
   255→                            sendProgressBroadcast(segment, total, progress, message, remainingSeconds)
   256→                            _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Transcribing(
   257→                                segment, total, progress, message
   258→                            )
   259→                        }
   260→                    )
   261→                }
   262→
   263→                // 转录完成
   264→                if (result != null && result.success) {
   265→                    val base = videoPath.substringBeforeLast(".")
   266→                    val vttPath = base + ".vtt"
   267→                    val wtsPath = base + ".wordts.json"
   268→
   269→                    // 如果字幕文件还不存在（可能是其他转录任务创建的），保存它们
   270→                    if (!File(vttPath).exists()) {
   271→                        saveSubtitles(result, vttPath, wtsPath)
   272→                    }
   273→
   274→                    // 保存完成后立即停止服务
   275→                    sendCompletedBroadcast(true, result.detectedLang, result.text, videoPath, vttPath)
   276→                    _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Completed(
   277→                        result.detectedLang,
   278→                        result.text
   279→                    )
   280→
   281→                    updateNotificationComplete(videoName)
   282→
   283→                    // 重置用户触发标志，服务将停止
   284→                    resetUserTrigger()
   285→
   286→                    // 移除已完成的任务
   287→                    activeJobs.remove(transcriptionId)
   288→                    if (activeJobs.isEmpty()) {
   289→                        isRunning = false
   290→                        currentVideoName = null
   291→                        stopForeground(STOP_FOREGROUND_REMOVE)
   292→                        stopSelf()
   293→                    }
   294→
   295→                } else {
   296→                    val error = result?.error ?: "未知错误"
   297→                    sendErrorBroadcast(error)
   298→                    _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Error(error)
   299→
   300→                    // 出错后也重置用户触发标志
   301→                    resetUserTrigger()
   302→
   303→                    activeJobs.remove(transcriptionId)
   304→                    if (activeJobs.isEmpty()) {
   305→                        isRunning = false
   306→                        currentVideoName = null
   307→                        stopForeground(STOP_FOREGROUND_REMOVE)
   308→                        stopSelf()
   309→                    }
   310→                }
   311→
   312→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   313→                Log.e(TAG, "Transcription error", e)
   314→                val error = "转录失败: ${e.message}"
   315→                sendErrorBroadcast(error)
   316→                _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Error(error)
   317→
   318→                activeJobs.remove(transcriptionId)
   319→                if (activeJobs.isEmpty()) {
   320→                    isRunning = false
   321→                    currentVideoName = null
   322→                    stopForeground(STOP_FOREGROUND_REMOVE)
   323→                    stopSelf()
   324→                }
   325→            }
   326→        }
   327→        activeJobs[transcriptionId] = job
   328→    }

   353→    private suspend fun saveSubtitles(
   354→        result: WhisperResult,
   355→        vttPath: String,
   356→        wtsPath: String
   357→    ) = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   358→        val vttBuilder = StringBuilder("WEBVTT\n\n")
   359→        val allWordTimings = mutableListOf<WordTimestamp>()
   360→
   361→        if (result.words.isNotEmpty()) {
   362→            var curWords = mutableListOf<WordTimestamp>()
   363→            for (wt in result.words) {
   364→                curWords.add(wt)
   365→                if (wt.w.trim().matches(Regex(".*[.!?。！？]$")) && curWords.isNotEmpty()) {
   366→                    val sentText = curWords.joinToString(" ") { it.w }
   367→                    val sStart = curWords.first().s
   368→                    val sEnd = curWords.last().e
   369→                    vttBuilder.append("${VttParser.formatVtt(sStart)} --> ${VttParser.formatVtt(sEnd)}\n$sentText\n\n")
   370→                    allWordTimings.addAll(curWords)
   371→                    curWords = mutableListOf()
   372→                }
   373→            }
   374→            if (curWords.isNotEmpty()) {
   375→                val sentText = curWords.joinToString(" ") { it.w }
   376→                val sStart = curWords.first().s
   377→                val sEnd = curWords.last().e
   378→                vttBuilder.append("${VttParser.formatVtt(sStart)} --> ${VttParser.formatVtt(sEnd)}\n$sentText\n\n")
   379→                allWordTimings.addAll(curWords)
   380→            }
   381→        }
   382→
   383→        File(vttPath).writeText(vttBuilder.toString())
   384→        if (allWordTimings.isNotEmpty()) {
   385→            val json = Json { ignoreUnknownKeys = true }
   386→            File(wtsPath).writeText(json.encodeToString(ListSerializer(WordTimestamp.serializer()), allWordTimings))
   387→        }
   388→
   389→        Log.d(TAG, "Subtitles saved: ${allWordTimings.size} words")
   390→    }

   404→    private fun sendProgressBroadcast(segment: Int, total: Int, progress: Int, message: String, remaining: Long) {
   405→        // 更新静态状态供页面恢复时查询
   406→        currentProgress = progress
   407→        currentMessage = message
   408→
   409→        val intent = Intent(ACTION_PROGRESS).apply {
   410→            putExtra(EXTRA_SEGMENT, segment)
   411→            putExtra(EXTRA_TOTAL, total)
   412→            putExtra(EXTRA_PROGRESS, progress)
   413→            putExtra(EXTRA_MESSAGE, message)
   414→            putExtra(EXTRA_REMAINING, remaining)
   415→        }
   416→        sendBroadcast(intent)
   417→    }
   418→
   419→    private fun sendCompletedBroadcast(success: Boolean, detectedLang: String, text: String, videoPath: String? = null, vttPath: String? = null) {
   420→        val intent = Intent(ACTION_COMPLETED).apply {
   421→            putExtra(EXTRA_SUCCESS, success)
   422→            putExtra(EXTRA_DETECTED_LANG, detectedLang)
   423→            // 计算字幕数量（粗略估计：按句子分割）
   424→            val subtitleCount = text.split(Regex("[.!?。！？]")).filter { it.isNotBlank() }.size
   425→            putExtra(EXTRA_SUBTITLE_COUNT, subtitleCount)
   426→            videoPath?.let { putExtra(EXTRA_VIDEO_PATH, it) }
   427→            vttPath?.let { putExtra(EXTRA_VTT_PATH, it) }
   428→        }
   429→        sendBroadcast(intent)
   430→    }

   434→            putExtra(EXTRA_SUCCESS, false)
   435→            putExtra(EXTRA_ERROR, error)
   436→        }
   437→        sendBroadcast(intent)
   438→    }

   461→    private fun createProgressNotification(
   462→        videoName: String,
   463→        segment: Int,
   464→        total: Int,
   465→        message: String
   466→    ): Notification {
   467→        val openIntent = Intent(this, com.multilanglearner.MainActivity::class.java).apply {
   468→            action = ACTION_OPEN
   469→            flags = Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP
   470→        }
   471→        val openPendingIntent = PendingIntent.getActivity(
   472→            this, 0, openIntent,
   473→            PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT or PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE
   474→        )
   475→
   476→        val cancelIntent = Intent(this, TranscriptionService::class.java).apply {
   477→            action = ACTION_CANCEL
   478→        }
   479→        val cancelPendingIntent = PendingIntent.getService(
   480→            this, 0, cancelIntent,
   481→            PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT or PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE
   482→        )
   483→
   484→        val progressText = if (total > 1) {
   485→            "分段 $segment/$total ($message)"
   486→        } else {
   487→            message
   488→        }
   489→
   490→        return NotificationCompat.Builder(this, CHANNEL_ID)

   496→            .setContentIntent(openPendingIntent)
   497→            .addAction(android.R.drawable.ic_menu_close_clear_cancel, "取消", cancelPendingIntent)
   498→            .setProgress(total, segment, false)
   499→            .build()
   500→    }

   528→    private fun isNetworkAvailable(): Boolean {
   529→        return try {
   530→            val cm = getSystemService(Context.CONNECTIVITY_SERVICE) as ConnectivityManager
   531→            val network = cm.activeNetwork ?: return false
   532→            val caps = cm.getNetworkCapabilities(network) ?: return false
   533→            caps.hasCapability(NetworkCapabilities.NET_CAPABILITY_INTERNET)
   534→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   535→            Log.e(TAG, "Failed to check network", e)
   536→            false
   537→        }

    14→/**
    15→ * 本地转录服务接口
    16→ *
    17→ * 支持的引擎：
    18→ * 1. **Sherpa-ONNX** - 推荐方案（离线、高性能、多语言）
    19→ * 2. **Whisper.cpp** - 高性能方案（需 NDK 编译）
    20→ * 3. **Android SpeechRecognizer** - 原生方案（免费，多语言）
    21→ *
    22→ * ## Sherpa-ONNX 集成方案（推荐）
    23→ *
    24→ * ### 优点
    25→ * - 专为移动端优化，性能好
    26→ * - 支持多种 Whisper 模型（tiny/base/small）
    27→ * - 完全离线，无需网络
    28→ * - 提供 Android AAR 包，集成简单
    29→ * - 支持实时转录和文件转录
    30→ *
    31→ * ### 集成步骤
    32→ * 1. 添加依赖到 build.gradle.kts：
    33→ *    ```kotlin
    34→ *    implementation("com.k2fsa.sherpa:onnx:1.10.0")
    35→ *    ```
    36→ *
    37→ * 2. 下载模型文件（选择一个）：
    38→ *    - tiny: 75MB (最快，准确率较低)
    39→ *    - base: 142MB (平衡)
    40→ *    - small: 466MB (最准确，较慢)
    41→ *    下载地址: https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases
    42→ *
    43→ * 3. 将模型文件放到 assets/models/ 目录
    44→ *
    45→ * 4. 使用示例：
    46→ *    ```kotlin
    47→ *    val config = OfflineRecognizerConfig(
    48→ *        modelConfig = OfflineModelConfig(
    49→ *            whisper = OfflineWhisperModelConfig(
    50→ *                encoder = "assets/models/whisper-tiny-encoder.onnx",
    51→ *                decoder = "assets/models/whisper-tiny-decoder.onnx"
    52→ *            )
    53→ *        )
    54→ *    )
    55→ *    val recognizer = OfflineRecognizer(context, config)
    56→ *    val stream = recognizer.createStream()
    57→ *    stream.acceptWaveform(audioSamples, sampleRate)
    58→ *    recognizer.decode(stream)
    59→ *    val result = recognizer.getResult(stream)
    60→ *    ```
    61→ *
    62→ * ### 性能对比
    63→ * - tiny 模型：约 2-3x 实时速度（1分钟音频需要20-30秒）
    64→ * - base 模型：约 1-2x 实时速度（1分钟音频需要30-60秒）
    65→ * - small 模型：约 0.5-1x 实时速度（1分钟音频需要60-120秒）
    66→ *
    67→ * ### 内存占用
    68→ * - tiny: ~200MB
    69→ * - base: ~400MB
    70→ * - small: ~800MB
    71→ *
    72→ * ## Whisper.cpp 集成方案（高级）
    73→ *
    74→ * ### 优点
    75→ * - C++ 实现，性能最优
    76→ * - 支持量化模型，内存占用更小
    77→ *
    78→ * ### 缺点
    79→ * - 需要 NDK 编译
    80→ * - 集成复杂度高
    81→ * - 需要 JNI 桥接
    82→ *
    83→ * ### 集成步骤
    84→ * 1. 克隆 whisper.cpp: https://github.com/ggerganov/whisper.cpp
    85→ * 2. 使用 NDK 编译 Android 库
    86→ * 3. 创建 JNI 桥接层
    87→ * 4. 集成到项目
    88→ *
    89→ * ## 推荐方案
    90→ * 对于本项目，推荐使用 **Sherpa-ONNX**：
    91→ * - 集成简单（只需添加依赖和模型文件）
    92→ * - 性能足够好（tiny 模型可达 2-3x 实时速度）
    93→ * - 完全离线，保护隐私
    94→ * - 支持多语言
    95→ */

    94→    /**
    95→     * 根据网络类型估算速度，动态计算最优分段时长
    96→     */
    97→    private fun calculateOptimalSegmentDuration(): Long {
    98→        try {
    99→            val cm = context.getSystemService(Context.CONNECTIVITY_SERVICE) as ConnectivityManager
   100→            val network = cm.activeNetwork ?: return SEGMENT_DURATION
   101→            val caps = cm.getNetworkCapabilities(network) ?: return SEGMENT_DURATION
   102→
   103→            val upBandwidth = caps.linkUpstreamBandwidthKbps
   104→
   105→            Log.d(TAG, "Network upstream bandwidth: ${upBandwidth}kbps")
   106→
   107→            return when {
   108→                upBandwidth > 8000 -> 600L   // >1MB/s: 10分钟
   109→                upBandwidth > 4000 -> 480L   // >500KB/s: 8分钟
   110→                upBandwidth > 1600 -> 360L   // >200KB/s: 6分钟
   111→                else -> 300L                  // 慢速: 5分钟
   112→            }
   113→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   114→            Log.w(TAG, "Failed to detect network speed, using default", e)
   115→            return SEGMENT_DURATION
   116→        }
   117→    }

   152→    /**
   153→     * 分段转录视频
   154→     * @param videoFile 视频文件
   155→     * @param config AI配置
   156→     * @param lang 视频语言代码（如 "en", "ru", "ja" 等），null 表示自动检测
   157→     * @param onProgress 进度回调 (当前段, 总段数, 百分比, 消息, 剩余秒数)
   158→     */
   159→    suspend fun transcribeWithSegments(
   160→        videoFile: File,
   161→        config: AIConfig,
   162→        lang: String? = null,
   163→        onProgress: (Int, Int, Int, String, Long) -> Unit = { _, _, _, _, _ -> }
   164→    ): WhisperResult? = withTimeout(TOTAL_TRANSCRIPTION_TIMEOUT_SEC * 1000L) {
   165→        try {
   166→            val fileSize = videoFile.length()
   167→            val fileSizeMB = String.format("%.2f", fileSize / 1024.0 / 1024.0)
   168→
   169→            Log.d(TAG, "Starting segmented transcription: ${videoFile.name}, $fileSizeMB MB")
   170→            onProgress(0, 1, 5, "获取视频信息...", 0)
   171→
   172→            // 获取视频时长和详细信息
   173→            val mediaInfo = getMediaInformation(videoFile)
   174→
   175→            // 尝试解析时长，兼容多种格式
   176→            val duration = try {
   177→                val durationStr = mediaInfo?.getDuration()
   178→                when {
   179→                    durationStr == null -> null
   180→                    durationStr.matches(Regex("\\d+")) -> durationStr.toLongOrNull()?.div(1000.0)
   181→                    durationStr.matches(Regex("\\d+\\.\\d+")) -> durationStr.toDoubleOrNull()
   182→                    else -> {
   183→                        Log.e(TAG, "Invalid duration format: $durationStr")
   184→                        null
   185→                    }
   186→                }
   187→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   188→                Log.e(TAG, "Error parsing duration: $mediaInfo", e)
   189→                null
   190→            }
   191→
   192→            if (duration == null) {
   193→                Log.e(TAG, "Failed to get video duration")
   194→                return@withTimeout WhisperResult(
   195→                    success = false,
   196→                    error = "无法读取视频时长，请确保视频文件有效。\n\nFFmpeg 错误: ${mediaInfo?.getAllProperties()}"
   197→                )
   198→            }
   199→
   200→            val durationMinutes = String.format("%.1f", duration / 60.0)
   201→            Log.d(TAG, "Video duration: $durationMinutes minutes ($duration seconds), file size: $fileSizeMB MB")
   202→
   203→            // 判断处理策略 - 基于时长而不是文件大小
   204→            return@withTimeout when {
   205→                duration <= SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD && fileSize <= MAX_API_FILE_SIZE -> {
   206→                    // 时长较短且文件在API限制内，先压缩音频再转录
   207→                    Log.d(TAG, "Direct transcription with compression (duration: ${duration.toInt()}s, size: ${fileSizeMB}MB)")
   208→                    onProgress(1, 1, 10, "压缩音频...", 0)
   209→
   210→                    // 先压缩音频
   211→                    val compressedFile = compressAudioForTranscription(videoFile)
   212→                    if (compressedFile == null) {
   213→                        Log.e(TAG, "Failed to compress audio, trying original file")
   214→                        onProgress(1, 1, 20, "直接转录中...", 0)
   215→                        whisperService.transcribeGroq(videoFile, config, lang)
   216→                    } else {
   217→                        Log.d(TAG, "Audio compressed: ${compressedFile.length()} bytes")
   218→                        onProgress(1, 1, 30, "转录中...", 0)
   219→                        val result = whisperService.transcribeGroq(compressedFile, config, lang)
   220→                        // 删除临时压缩文件
   221→                        compressedFile.delete()
   222→                        result
   223→                    }
   224→                }
   225→                else -> {
   226→                    // 时长较长或文件过大，需要分段处理
   227→                    val reason = if (duration > SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD) {
   228→                        "video duration exceeds ${SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD.toInt()/60} minutes"
   229→                    } else {
   230→                        "file size exceeds ${MAX_API_FILE_SIZE/1024/1024}MB"
   231→                    }
   232→                    Log.d(TAG, "Segmented transcription: $reason")
   233→                    transcribeSegmentedInternal(videoFile, config, duration, lang, onProgress)
   234→                }
   235→            }
   236→
   237→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   238→            Log.e(TAG, "Transcription error", e)
   239→            Log.e(TAG, "Error stack trace: ${e.stackTraceToString()}")
   240→            WhisperResult(
   241→                success = false,
   242→                error = "❌ 转录失败\n\n错误: ${e.message}\n\n详细日志已输出到 logcat"
   243→            )
   244→        }
   245→    }

   247→    /**
   248→     * 内部分段转录实现 - 流水线模式（边提取边转录，提高速度）
   249→     *
   250→     * 优化策略：
   251→     * - 第一段：提取 → 转录 → 检测语言（串行，确保精确）
   252→     * - 后续段：生产者串行提取，消费者并行转录，通过 Channel 流水线衔接
   253→     * - 提取一段完成后立即可被转录，无需等待全部提取完毕
   254→     */
   255→    private suspend fun transcribeSegmentedInternal(
   256→        videoFile: File,
   257→        config: AIConfig,
   258→        duration: Double,
   259→        lang: String?,
   260→        onProgress: (Int, Int, Int, String, Long) -> Unit
   261→    ): WhisperResult? = coroutineScope {
   262→        Log.d(TAG, "Starting pipeline segmented transcription, duration: ${duration}s")
   263→        ensureActive()
   264→
   265→        val dynamicDuration = calculateOptimalSegmentDuration()
   266→        Log.d(TAG, "Dynamic segment duration: ${dynamicDuration}s based on network speed")
   267→        val segments = calculateSegments(duration, videoFile.length(), dynamicDuration)
   268→        val totalSegments = segments.size
   269→
   270→        Log.d(TAG, "Will process in $totalSegments segments (pipeline mode, parallel: $PARALLEL_SEGMENTS)")
   271→        onProgress(0, totalSegments, 10, "准备处理 $totalSegments 个分段...", 0)
   272→
   273→        val segmentStates = mutableMapOf<Int, SegmentState>()
   274→        segments.forEachIndexed { index, _ ->
   275→            segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.PENDING)
   276→        }
   277→
   278→        val tempDir = File(context.cacheDir, "$TEMP_DIR${System.currentTimeMillis()}")
   279→        tempDir.mkdirs()
   280→
   281→        val startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   282→        val segmentTimes = mutableMapOf<Int, Long>()
   283→
   284→        return@coroutineScope try {
   285→            val allWords = mutableListOf<WordTimestamp>()
   286→            var failedSegments = 0
   287→            val successSegments = mutableListOf<Int>()
   288→            val completedIndices = mutableListOf<Int>()
   289→            val transcriptionMutex = Mutex()
   290→
   291→            // === 快速语言检测：只提取前30秒，快速检测语言 ===
   292→            var effectiveLang = lang
   293→            var contextPrompt: String? = null  // 上下文 prompt，传给后续段提高质量
   294→
   295→            if (effectiveLang == null && segments.isNotEmpty()) {
   296→                val probeFile = File(tempDir, "lang_probe.ogg")
   297→                val probeDuration = minOf(LANG_DETECT_DURATION, segments[0].duration)
   298→
   299→                segmentStates[0] = SegmentState(0, SegmentStatus.EXTRACTING, "快速语言检测...")
   300→                updateProgressWithStates(0, totalSegments, 12, "快速语言检测...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   301→
   302→                val probeSuccess = withTimeout(60_000L) {
   303→                    extractAudioSegmentWithRetry(videoFile, probeFile, segments[0].startTime, probeDuration, -1)
   304→                }
   305→
   306→                if (probeSuccess && probeFile.exists()) {
   307→                    val probeResult = try {
   308→                        withTimeout(60_000L) {
   309→                            whisperService.transcribeGroq(probeFile, config, null, null)
   310→                        }
   311→                    } catch (e: Exception) {
   312→                        Log.e(TAG, "Language probe failed", e)
   313→                        null
   314→                    }
   315→
   316→                    if (probeResult?.success == true && probeResult.detectedLang.isNotBlank()) {
   317→                        effectiveLang = LANG_NAME_TO_CODE[probeResult.detectedLang.lowercase()]
   318→                            ?: probeResult.detectedLang.lowercase().take(2)
   319→                        // 提取最后几句话作为上下文 prompt
   320→                        val probeText = probeResult.text.trim()
   321→                        contextPrompt = if (probeText.length > 200) probeText.takeLast(200) else probeText
   322→                        Log.d(TAG, "Quick language detection: ${probeResult.detectedLang} -> $effectiveLang")
   323→                    } else {
   324→                        Log.w(TAG, "Language probe inconclusive, using auto-detect")
   325→                    }
   326→                }
   327→                probeFile.delete()
   328→
   329→                updateProgressWithStates(0, totalSegments, 15,
   330→                    "语言: ${effectiveLang ?: "auto"}, 开始流水线...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   331→            }
   332→
   333→            // === 全部段：流水线模式（边提取边转录）===
   334→            val remainingIndices = segments.indices.toList()
   335→            ensureActive()
   336→
   337→            if (remainingIndices.isNotEmpty()) {
   338→                // Channel 缓冲2段，让提取可以领先转录
   339→                val channel = Channel<Pair<Int, File>>(capacity = 2)
   340→                val semaphore = Semaphore(PARALLEL_SEGMENTS)
   341→
   342→                // 生产者：串行提取音频段
   343→                val producerJob = launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
   344→                    try {
   345→                        for (index in remainingIndices) {
   346→                            ensureActive()
   347→                            val segment = segments[index]
   348→                            val segmentFile = File(tempDir, "segment_${index}.ogg")
   349→
   350→                            segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.EXTRACTING, "提取音频中...")
   351→                            transcriptionMutex.withLock {
   352→                                val completedCount = completedIndices.size
   353→                                val progress = 35 + (completedCount * 55 / totalSegments)
   354→                                updateProgressWithStates(completedCount, totalSegments, progress,
   355→                                    "提取段 ${index + 1}...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   356→                            }
   357→
   358→                            val extractSuccess = withTimeout(EXTRACTION_TIMEOUT_SEC * 1000L) {
   359→                                extractAudioSegmentWithRetry(videoFile, segmentFile, segment.startTime, segment.duration, index)
   360→                            }
   361→
   362→                            if (extractSuccess && segmentFile.exists()) {
   363→                                segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.EXTRACTED, "等待转录...")
   364→                                Log.d(TAG, "Segment $index extracted, sending to pipeline")
   365→                                channel.send(index to segmentFile)
   366→                            } else {
   367→                                Log.e(TAG, "Failed to extract segment $index")
   368→                                segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.FAILED, "音频提取失败")
   369→                                failedSegments++
   370→                            }
   371→                        }
   372→                    } finally {
   373→                        channel.close()
   374→                    }
   375→                }
   376→
   377→                // 消费者：并行转录
   378→                val consumerJobs = (1..PARALLEL_SEGMENTS).map {
   379→                    async(Dispatchers.IO) {
   380→                        for ((index, segmentFile) in channel) {
   381→                            semaphore.withPermit {
   382→                                ensureActive()
   383→                                val segment = segments[index]
   384→                                val segmentStartTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   385→
   386→                                segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.TRANSCRIBING, "转录中...")
   387→                                transcriptionMutex.withLock {
   388→                                    val completedCount = completedIndices.size
   389→                                    updateProgressWithStates(completedCount, totalSegments, 35 + (completedCount * 55 / totalSegments),
   390→                                        "段 ${index + 1} 转录中...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   391→                                }
   392→
   393→                                val transcriptionTimeout = (segment.duration / 60.0 * TRANSCRIPTION_TIMEOUT_SEC_PER_MIN * 1000).toLong()
   394→                                val result = try {
   395→                                    withTimeout(transcriptionTimeout) {
   396→                                        transcribeSegmentWithRetry(segmentFile, config, index, segment.duration, effectiveLang, contextPrompt)
   397→                                    }
   398→                                } catch (e: CancellationException) {
   399→                                    throw e
   400→                                } catch (e: Exception) {
   401→                                    Log.e(TAG, "Segment $index transcription timeout/error", e)
   402→                                    null
   403→                                }
   404→
   405→                                val transcriptionTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - segmentStartTime
   406→                                segmentTimes[index] = transcriptionTime
   407→
   408→                                if (result?.success == true) {
   409→                                    val adjustedWords = result.words.map { wt ->
   410→                                        wt.copy(s = wt.s + segment.startTime, e = wt.e + segment.startTime)
   411→                                    }
   412→
   413→                                    transcriptionMutex.withLock {
   414→                                        if (index > 0) {
   415→                                            val overlapThreshold = segment.startTime - OVERLAP_DURATION.toDouble()
   416→                                            allWords.addAll(adjustedWords.filter { it.s >= overlapThreshold })
   417→                                        } else {
   418→                                            allWords.addAll(adjustedWords)
   419→                                        }
   420→                                        completedIndices.add(index)
   421→                                        successSegments.add(index)
   422→
   423→                                        val completedCount = completedIndices.size
   424→                                        val progress = 35 + (completedCount * 55 / totalSegments)
   425→                                        val remainingTime = estimateRemainingTime(completedCount - 1, totalSegments, segmentTimes, startTime)
   426→                                        updateProgressWithStates(completedCount, totalSegments, progress,
   427→                                            "转录中 $completedCount/$totalSegments...", remainingTime, segmentStates, onProgress)
   428→                                    }
   429→
   430→                                    segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.COMPLETED, "已完成 (${result.words.size} 词)")
   431→                                    Log.d(TAG, "Segment $index transcribed: ${result.words.size} words, time=${transcriptionTime}ms")
   432→                                } else {
   433→                                    Log.e(TAG, "Segment $index transcription failed: ${result?.error}")
   434→                                    failedSegments++
   435→
   436→                                    val errorBrief = when {
   437→                                        result?.error?.contains("API Key") == true -> "API Key错误"
   438→                                        result?.error?.contains("quota") == true -> "配额用尽"
   439→                                        result?.error?.contains("network") == true -> "网络错误"
   440→                                        else -> "转录失败"
   441→                                    }
   442→                                    segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.FAILED, errorBrief)
   443→                                }
   444→
   445→                                segmentFile.delete()
   446→                            }
   447→                        }
   448→                    }
   449→                }
   450→
   451→                // 等待生产者和消费者都完成
   452→                try {
   453→                    producerJob.join()
   454→                    consumerJobs.awaitAll()
   455→                } catch (e: CancellationException) {
   456→                    producerJob.cancel()
   457→                    Log.d(TAG, "Pipeline cancelled by user")
   458→                    throw e
   459→                }
   460→            }
   461→
   462→            // 按时间排序所有单词
   463→            allWords.sortBy { it.s }
   464→
   465→            // 清理临时目录
   466→            tempDir.deleteRecursively()
   467→
   468→            if (allWords.isEmpty()) {
   469→                val failedDetails = segmentStates.entries
   470→                    .filter { it.value.status == SegmentStatus.FAILED }
   471→                    .map { "段 ${it.key + 1}: ${it.value.message}" }
   472→                    .joinToString("\n")
   473→
   474→                WhisperResult(
   475→                    success = false,
   476→                    error = "❌ 所有分段转录失败\n\n" +
   477→                        "总段数: $totalSegments\n" +
   478→                        "失败: $failedSegments\n" +
   479→                        "成功: 0\n\n" +
   480→                        "失败详情:\n$failedDetails\n\n" +
   481→                        "建议解决方案:\n" +
   482→                        "1. 检查网络连接是否正常\n" +
   483→                        "2. 确认 Groq API Key 已正确配置\n" +
   484→                        "3. 查看是否有配额限制\n" +
   485→                        "4. 尝试减少并发转录数量"
   486→                )
   487→            } else {
   488→                val sentences = buildSentences(allWords)
   489→                val fullText = sentences.joinToString(" ")
   490→                val totalTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime
   491→
   492→                updateProgressWithStates(totalSegments, totalSegments, 100, "转录完成！", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   493→
   494→                Log.d(TAG, "Pipeline transcription complete: ${allWords.size} words, ${sentences.size} sentences")
   495→                Log.d(TAG, "Total time: ${formatTime(totalTime)}, Failed: $failedSegments/$totalSegments")
   496→
   497→                WhisperResult(
   498→                    success = true,
   499→                    text = fullText,
   500→                    words = allWords,
   501→                    detectedLang = effectiveLang ?: ""
   502→                )
   503→            }
   504→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   505→            tempDir.deleteRecursively()
   506→            Log.e(TAG, "Pipeline transcription error", e)
   507→            WhisperResult(
   508→                success = false,
   509→                error = "分段转录失败: ${e.message}\n\n建议：检查网络连接和 API Key 配置"
   510→            )
   511→        }
   512→    }

   514→    /**
   515→     * 更新进度（带分段状态）
   516→     */
   517→    private fun updateProgressWithStates(
   518→        currentSegment: Int,
   519→        totalSegments: Int,
   520→        percent: Int,
   521→        message: String,
   522→        remainingSeconds: Long,
   523→        segmentStates: Map<Int, SegmentState>,
   524→        onProgress: (Int, Int, Int, String, Long) -> Unit
   525→    ) {
   526→        // 在消息中添加状态摘要
   527→        val completedCount = segmentStates.values.count { it.status == SegmentStatus.COMPLETED }
   528→        val failedCount = segmentStates.values.count { it.status == SegmentStatus.FAILED }
   529→        val inProgressCount = segmentStates.values.count { it.status == SegmentStatus.TRANSCRIBING }
   530→
   531→        val statusSummary = when {
   532→            failedCount > 0 -> " (成功$completedCount, 失败$failedCount)"
   533→            inProgressCount > 0 -> " (进行中$inProgressCount)"
   534→            else -> ""
   535→        }
   536→
   537→        onProgress(currentSegment, totalSegments, percent, message + statusSummary, remainingSeconds)
   538→    }

   540→    /**
   541→     * 提取音频段 - 带重试机制
   542→     */
   543→    private suspend fun extractAudioSegmentWithRetry(
   544→        inputFile: File,
   545→        outputFile: File,
   546→        startTime: Double,
   547→        duration: Double,
   548→        segmentIndex: Int
   549→    ): Boolean = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   550→        var lastError: Exception? = null
   551→
   552→        repeat(MAX_RETRIES) { attempt ->
   553→            if (attempt > 0) {
   554→                Log.d(TAG, "Retrying segment $segmentIndex extraction, attempt $attempt/$MAX_RETRIES")
   555→                delay(RETRY_DELAY_BASE_MS * attempt)
   556→            }
   557→
   558→            try {
   559→                val success = extractAudioSegment(inputFile, outputFile, startTime, duration)
   560→                if (success) return@withContext true
   561→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   562→                Log.w(TAG, "Segment $segmentIndex extraction attempt $attempt failed: ${e.message}")
   563→                lastError = e
   564→            }
   565→        }
   566→
   567→        Log.e(TAG, "Segment $segmentIndex extraction failed after $MAX_RETRIES retries", lastError)
   568→        false
   569→    }
   570→
   571→    /**
   572→     * 转录单个段 - 带重试机制，包括速率限制处理
   573→     */
   574→    private suspend fun transcribeSegmentWithRetry(
   575→        segmentFile: File,
   576→        config: AIConfig,
   577→        segmentIndex: Int,
   578→        segmentDuration: Double,
   579→        lang: String?,
   580→        contextPrompt: String? = null
   581→    ): WhisperResult? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   582→        var lastResult: WhisperResult? = null
   583→        var actualAttempts = 0
   584→        val maxAttempts = MAX_RETRIES + 2  // 额外允许2次429重试
   585→
   586→        while (actualAttempts < maxAttempts) {
   587→            if (actualAttempts > 0) {
   588→                Log.d(TAG, "Retrying segment $segmentIndex transcription, attempt $actualAttempts")
   589→            }
   590→
   591→            val result = whisperService.transcribeGroq(segmentFile, config, lang, contextPrompt)
   592→            if (result?.success == true) {
   593→                delay(API_REQUEST_INTERVAL_MS)
   594→                return@withContext result
   595→            }
   596→
   597→            // 检查是否是速率限制错误（429）- 等待API指定时间后重试，不计入常规重试
   598→            if (result?.error?.contains("Rate limit", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   599→                result?.error?.contains("rate_limit", ignoreCase = true) == true) {
   600→                val isRateLimit = whisperService.isRateLimitError(result.error)
   601→                val waitSeconds = if (isRateLimit.first && isRateLimit.second > 0) {
   602→                    isRateLimit.second + 2  // 多等2秒确保配额恢复
   603→                } else {
   604→                    30  // 默认等30秒
   605→                }
   606→                Log.w(TAG, "Rate limit on segment $segmentIndex, waiting ${waitSeconds}s before retry")
   607→                delay(waitSeconds * 1000L)
   608→                actualAttempts++
   609→                continue
   610→            }
   611→
   612→            // 非429错误，正常重试
   613→            actualAttempts++
   614→            if (actualAttempts < maxAttempts) {
   615→                delay(RETRY_DELAY_BASE_MS * actualAttempts)
   616→            }
   617→            lastResult = result
   618→        }
   619→
   620→        Log.e(TAG, "Segment $segmentIndex transcription failed after $actualAttempts attempts")
   621→        lastResult
   622→    }

   624→    /**
   625→     * 估算剩余时间（秒）
   626→     */
   627→    private fun estimateRemainingTime(
   628→        currentIndex: Int,
   629→        totalSegments: Int,
   630→        segmentTimes: Map<Int, Long>,
   631→        overallStartTime: Long
   632→    ): Long {
   633→        if (currentIndex == 0 || segmentTimes.isEmpty()) {
   634→            // 还没有完成任何段，预估每段需要2分钟
   635→            return (totalSegments * 120L)
   636→        }
   637→
   638→        // 计算已完成段的平均时间
   639→        val avgTimePerSegment = segmentTimes.values.average()
   640→        val remainingSegments = totalSegments - currentIndex
   641→
   642→        return (avgTimePerSegment * remainingSegments / 1000).toLong()
   643→    }

   645→    /**
   646→     * 格式化时间显示
   647→     */
   648→    private fun formatTime(milliseconds: Long): String {
   649→        val seconds = milliseconds / 1000
   650→        return when {
   651→            seconds < 60 -> "${seconds}秒"
   652→            seconds < 3600 -> "${seconds / 60}分${seconds % 60}秒"
   653→            else -> "${seconds / 3600}小时${(seconds % 3600) / 60}分"
   654→        }
   655→    }

   657→    /**
   658→     * 计算分段策略 - 智能分段（优化版）
   659→     * 1. 根据码率计算最大分段时长（确保不超过 API 文件大小限制）
   660→     * 2. 动态调整分段大小以最小化总段数
   661→     * 3. 在静音点处分段，避免在语句中间切断
   662→     */
   663→    private fun calculateSegments(duration: Double, fileSize: Long = 0, dynamicSegmentDuration: Long? = null): List<AudioSegment> {
   664→        // 根据文件大小和时长计算最佳分段时长
   665→        val estimatedBitrate = if (fileSize > 0 && duration > 0) {
   666→            (fileSize * 8.0 / duration / 1000.0) // kbps
   667→        } else {
   668→            128.0
   669→        }
   670→
   671→        // 计算确保不超过 TARGET_SEGMENT_SIZE 的最大分段时长
   672→        // 使用压缩后的比特率估算（24kbps）而不是原始比特率
   673→        val compressedBitrate = 12.0 // kbps（更新为12kbps，与压缩参数一致）
   674→        val maxSegmentDurationForSize = (TARGET_SEGMENT_SIZE * 8.0 / (compressedBitrate * 1000.0))
   675→            .coerceAtMost((dynamicSegmentDuration ?: SEGMENT_DURATION).toDouble())
   676→
   677→        // 不低于 3 分钟（增加最小分段时长减少总段数）
   678→        val targetSegmentDuration = maxSegmentDurationForSize.coerceAtLeast(180.0) // 3分钟
   679→
   680→        Log.d(TAG, "Segment strategy: targetDuration=${targetSegmentDuration.toInt()}s, originalBitrate=${estimatedBitrate.toInt()}kbps, compressedBitrate=${compressedBitrate.toInt()}kbps, totalDuration=${duration.toInt()}s")
   681→
   682→        // 如果总时长不需要分段
   683→        if (duration <= targetSegmentDuration + 30) {
   684→            return listOf(AudioSegment(0, 0.0, duration))
   685→        }
   686→
   687→        // 构建分段：在目标时长附近寻找自然断点
   688→        val segments = mutableListOf<AudioSegment>()
   689→        var currentStart = 0.0
   690→        var index = 0
   691→
   692→        while (currentStart < duration - 10) { // 剩余不足10秒就合并到上一段
   693→            val idealEnd = (currentStart + targetSegmentDuration).coerceAtMost(duration)
   694→
   695→            if (idealEnd >= duration - 10) {
   696→                // 最后一段，直接到结尾
   697→                segments.add(AudioSegment(index, currentStart, duration - currentStart))
   698→                break
   699→            }
   700→
   701→            // 实际分段时长（加 OVERLAP_DURATION 的重叠）
   702→            val segmentDuration = idealEnd - currentStart
   703→            segments.add(AudioSegment(index, currentStart, segmentDuration))
   704→
   705→            // 下一段从重叠点开始
   706→            currentStart = idealEnd - OVERLAP_DURATION
   707→            index++
   708→        }
   709→
   710→        // 如果循环结束但没有覆盖到末尾
   711→        if (segments.isEmpty()) {
   712→            segments.add(AudioSegment(0, 0.0, duration))
   713→        }
   714→
   715→        Log.d(TAG, "Created ${segments.size} segments (optimized for speed)")
   716→        return segments
   717→    }

   719→    /**
   720→     * 提取音频段 - 重新编码确保兼容性
   721→     * 修复：使用 Opus 编码，压缩率更高，同等质量下文件更小，上传更快
   722→     */
   723→    private suspend fun extractAudioSegment(
   724→        inputFile: File,
   725→        outputFile: File,
   726→        startTime: Double,
   727→        duration: Double
   728→    ): Boolean = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   729→        try {
   730→            outputFile.parentFile?.mkdirs()
   731→
   732→            // Opus 编码：16kbps opus ≈ 24kbps aac 质量，文件小约33%
   733→            val commandStr = buildString {
   734→                append("-hide_banner -y ")
   735→                append("-ss $startTime ")
   736→                append("-i \"${inputFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   737→                append("-t $duration ")
   738→                append("-vn ")
   739→                append("-acodec libopus ")
   740→                append("-b:a 12k ")
   741→                append("-ac 1 ")
   742→                append("-ar 16000 ")
   743→                append("-application voip ")  // 语音优化模式
   744→                append("-compression_level 10 ")
   745→                append("\"${outputFile.absolutePath}\"")
   746→            }
   747→
   748→            Log.d(TAG, "FFmpeg command: ffmpeg $commandStr")
   749→            Log.d(TAG, "Input file: ${inputFile.absolutePath}, size: ${inputFile.length()}")
   750→            Log.d(TAG, "Output file: ${outputFile.absolutePath}")
   751→
   752→            // 使用同步执行
   753→            val session = FFmpegKit.execute(commandStr)
   754→
   755→            val returnCode = session.returnCode
   756→            val output = session.output
   757→
   758→            Log.d(TAG, "FFmpeg return code: ${returnCode?.value}")
   759→            if (output?.isNotEmpty() == true) {
   760→                Log.d(TAG, "FFmpeg output: ${output.substring(0, minOf(200, output.length))}")
   761→            }
   762→
   763→            // 检查输出文件（降低最小文件大小阈值，因为压缩后文件会更小）
   764→            val success = (returnCode?.value == 0) && outputFile.exists() && outputFile.length() > 512
   765→
   766→            Log.d(TAG, "Segment extraction result: $success, file size: ${outputFile.length()}, return code: ${returnCode?.value}")
   767→            success
   768→
   769→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   770→            Log.e(TAG, "Error extracting segment", e)
   771→            false
   772→        }
   773→    }

   775→    /**
   776→     * 压缩音频文件用于转录
   777→     * 优化参数：使用更高效的压缩设置
   778→     */
   779→    private suspend fun compressAudioForTranscription(videoFile: File): File? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   780→        try {
   781→            val tempFile = File(context.cacheDir, "compressed_${System.currentTimeMillis()}.ogg")
   782→
   783→            // Opus 编码：16kbps 语音优化，比 24kbps AAC 文件更小质量相当
   784→            val commandStr = buildString {
   785→                append("-hide_banner -y ")
   786→                append("-i \"${videoFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   787→                append("-vn ")
   788→                append("-acodec libopus ")
   789→                append("-b:a 12k ")
   790→                append("-ac 1 ")
   791→                append("-ar 16000 ")
   792→                append("-application voip ")
   793→                append("-compression_level 10 ")
   794→                append("-map_metadata -1 ")
   795→                append("\"${tempFile.absolutePath}\"")
   796→            }
   797→
   798→            Log.d(TAG, "Compression command: ffmpeg $commandStr")
   799→            val session = FFmpegKit.execute(commandStr)
   800→
   801→            val returnCode = session.returnCode
   802→            val success = (returnCode?.value == 0 || returnCode?.value == 1) && tempFile.exists() && tempFile.length() > 512
   803→
   804→            if (success) {
   805→                Log.d(TAG, "Audio compressed: ${tempFile.length()} bytes (from ${videoFile.length()} bytes)")
   806→                tempFile
   807→            } else {
   808→                Log.e(TAG, "Compression failed: return code ${returnCode?.value}, file exists: ${tempFile.exists()}, size: ${tempFile.length()}")
   809→                tempFile.delete()
   810→                null
   811→            }
   812→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   813→            Log.e(TAG, "Error compressing audio", e)
   814→            null
   815→        }
   816→    }

   821→    private fun getMediaInformation(file: File): com.arthenica.ffmpegkit.MediaInformation? {

   840→            Log.e(TAG, "Error stack trace: ${e.stackTraceToString()}")
   841→            null
   842→        }
   843→    }
   844→
   845→    /**
   846→     * 从单词构建句子
   847→     */
   848→    private fun buildSentences(words: List<WordTimestamp>): List<String> {
   849→        val sentences = mutableListOf<String>()
   850→        val currentSentence = mutableListOf<String>()
   851→
   852→        words.forEach { wt ->
   853→            currentSentence.add(wt.w)
   854→
   855→            // 检查句子结束
   856→            if (wt.w.trim().matches(Regex(".*[.!?。！？]$"))) {
   857→                sentences.add(currentSentence.joinToString(" "))
   858→                currentSentence.clear()
   859→            }
   860→        }
   861→
   862→        // 添加最后一个未完成的句子
   863→        if (currentSentence.isNotEmpty()) {
   864→            sentences.add(currentSentence.joinToString(" "))
   865→        }
   866→
   867→        return sentences
   868→    }
   869→}
   870→

   872→ * 音频分段数据类
   873→ */
   874→data class AudioSegment(
   875→    val index: Int,
   876→    val startTime: Double,  // 段开始时间（秒）
   877→    val duration: Double     // 段持续时间（秒）
   878→)

1→package com.multilanglearner.data.network
     2→
     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import android.util.Log
     5→import dagger.hilt.android.qualifiers.ApplicationContext
     6→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
     7→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
     8→import okhttp3.OkHttpClient
     9→import okhttp3.Request
    10→import java.io.File
    11→import java.io.FileOutputStream
    12→import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
    13→import javax.inject.Inject
    14→import javax.inject.Singleton
    15→
    16→/**
    17→ * Sherpa-ONNX 模型下载和管理服务
    18→ *
    19→ * 模型存储位置: 用户选择的目录/models/sherpa-onnx-whisper-base/
    20→ * 模型文件:
    21→ *   - base-encoder.int8.onnx (~40MB)
    22→ *   - base-decoder.int8.onnx (~40MB)
    23→ *   - base-tokens.txt (~1KB)
    24→ */
    25→@Singleton
    26→class ModelManager @Inject constructor(
    27→    @ApplicationContext private val context: Context
    28→) {
    29→    companion object {
    30→        private const val TAG = "ModelManager"
    31→        private const val MODEL_DIR_NAME = "sherpa-onnx-whisper-base"
    32→        private const val PREFS_NAME = "model_manager_prefs"
    33→        private const val KEY_MODEL_PATH = "model_path"
    34→
    35→        // Sherpa-ONNX 模型下载地址
    36→        private const val BASE_URL = "https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/asr-models/"
    37→        private const val ENCODER_FILE = "sherpa-onnx-whisper-base/base-encoder.int8.onnx"
    38→        private const val DECODER_FILE = "sherpa-onnx-whisper-base/base-decoder.int8.onnx"
    39→        private const val TOKENS_FILE = "sherpa-onnx-whisper-base/base-tokens.txt"
    40→
    41→        // 本地文件名
    42→        private const val LOCAL_ENCODER = "base-encoder.int8.onnx"
    43→        private const val LOCAL_DECODER = "base-decoder.int8.onnx"
    44→        private const val LOCAL_TOKENS = "base-tokens.txt"
    45→    }
    46→
    47→    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    48→        .connectTimeout(30, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    49→        .readTimeout(600, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    50→        .followRedirects(true)
    51→        .build()
    52→
    53→    private val prefs = context.getSharedPreferences(PREFS_NAME, Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
    54→
    55→    /**
    56→     * 获取模型目录（优先使用用户设置的路径）
    57→     */
    58→    val modelDir: File
    59→        get() {
    60→            val customPath = prefs.getString(KEY_MODEL_PATH, null)
    61→            return if (customPath != null) {
    62→                File(customPath, "models/$MODEL_DIR_NAME")
    63→            } else {
    64→                File(context.filesDir, "models/$MODEL_DIR_NAME")
    65→            }
    66→        }
    67→
    68→    /**
    69→     * 设置模型存储路径
    70→     */
    71→    fun setModelPath(path: String?) {
    72→        prefs.edit().putString(KEY_MODEL_PATH, path).apply()
    73→    }
    74→
    75→    /**
    76→     * 获取当前模型路径
    77→     */
    78→    fun getModelPath(): String? = prefs.getString(KEY_MODEL_PATH, null)
    79→
    80→    /**
    81→     * 获取默认模型路径
    82→     */
    83→    fun getDefaultModelPath(): String = context.filesDir.absolutePath
    84→
    85→    /**
    86→     * 检查模型是否已下载
    87→     */
    88→    fun isModelDownloaded(): Boolean {
    89→        val dir = modelDir
    90→        return File(dir, LOCAL_ENCODER).exists() &&
    91→               File(dir, LOCAL_DECODER).exists() &&
    92→               File(dir, LOCAL_TOKENS).exists()
    93→    }
    94→
    95→    /**
    96→     * 获取模型总大小（MB）
    97→     */
    98→    fun getModelSizeMB(): Double {
    99→        if (!isModelDownloaded()) return 0.0
   100→        return modelDir.walkTopDown()
   101→            .filter { it.isFile }
   102→            .map { it.length() }
   103→            .sum() / 1024.0 / 1024.0
   104→    }
   105→
   106→    /**
   107→     * 下载模型文件
   108→     * @param onProgress (已下载字节, 总字节, 百分比, 当前文件名)
   109→     * @return Result<Boolean> 下载结果
   110→     */
   111→    suspend fun downloadModel(
   112→        onProgress: (Long, Long, Int, String) -> Unit = { _, _, _, _ -> }
   113→    ): Result<Boolean> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   114→        try {
   115→            val dir = modelDir
   116→            dir.mkdirs()
   117→
   118→            val files = listOf(
   119→                ENCODER_FILE to LOCAL_ENCODER,
   120→                DECODER_FILE to LOCAL_DECODER,
   121→                TOKENS_FILE to LOCAL_TOKENS
   122→            )
   123→
   124→            var totalDownloaded = 0L
   125→            val estimatedTotal = 80 * 1024 * 1024L
   126→
   127→            for ((remoteFile, localFile) in files) {
   128→                val targetFile = File(dir, localFile)
   129→
   130→                if (targetFile.exists() && targetFile.length() > 100) {
   131→                    Log.d(TAG, "File already exists: $localFile")
   132→                    totalDownloaded += targetFile.length()
   133→                    continue
   134→                }
   135→
   136→                Log.d(TAG, "Downloading: $remoteFile")
   137→                onProgress(totalDownloaded, estimatedTotal, (totalDownloaded * 100 / estimatedTotal).toInt(), localFile)
   138→
   139→                val url = BASE_URL + remoteFile
   140→                val request = Request.Builder().url(url).build()
   141→                val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   142→
   143→                if (!response.isSuccessful) {
   144→                    Log.e(TAG, "Download failed: ${response.code}")
   145→                    return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("下载失败: $remoteFile (HTTP ${response.code})"))
   146→                }
   147→
   148→                val body = response.body ?: return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("空响应: $remoteFile"))
   149→                val tempFile = File(dir, "$localFile.tmp")
   150→
   151→                body.byteStream().use { input ->
   152→                    FileOutputStream(tempFile).use { output ->
   153→                        val buffer = ByteArray(8192)
   154→                        var bytesRead: Int
   155→
   156→                        while (input.read(buffer).also { bytesRead = it } != -1) {
   157→                            output.write(buffer, 0, bytesRead)
   158→                            totalDownloaded += bytesRead
   159→
   160→                            val percent = (totalDownloaded * 100 / estimatedTotal).toInt().coerceAtMost(99)
   161→                            onProgress(totalDownloaded, estimatedTotal, percent, localFile)
   162→                        }
   163→                    }
   164→                }
   165→
   166→                tempFile.renameTo(targetFile)
   167→                Log.d(TAG, "Downloaded: $localFile")
   168→            }
   169→
   170→            onProgress(totalDownloaded, totalDownloaded, 100, "完成")
   171→            Log.d(TAG, "All model files downloaded")
   172→            Result.success(true)
   173→
   174→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   175→            Log.e(TAG, "Download failed", e)
   176→            Result.failure(e)
   177→        }
   178→    }
   179→
   180→    /**
   181→     * 删除模型文件
   182→     */
   183→    fun deleteModel(): Boolean {
   184→        return try {
   185→            modelDir.deleteRecursively()
   186→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   187→            Log.e(TAG, "Failed to delete model", e)
   188→            false
   189→        }
   190→    }
   191→}
